trigger: drive confirmed NC input from healthy high to E-stop low
expected_result: PL STATUS estop_latched asserts and selected hard outputs enter safe/off state
next_action: Capture input and hard-output traces after real NC input and output gates are wired.

trigger: open or disconnect confirmed NC safety-chain input
expected_result: PL treats disconnect as E-stop and remains latched
next_action: Measure disconnect behavior on the real input circuit.

trigger: inject low pulse shorter than debounce window
expected_result: PL does not falsely release or false-trigger outside documented debounce behavior
acceptance_limit: short pulse rejected per configured debounce
next_action: Measure debounce behavior around the 10ms to 20ms design window.

trigger: hold input low longer than debounce window
expected_result: PL latches E-stop after debounce and stays latched
next_action: Measure trigger threshold with the real input path.

trigger: write software reset while physical input remains low
expected_result: PL rejects reset and STATUS estop_latched remains asserted
next_action: Record AXI readback before and after reset attempt.

trigger: restore physical input high then issue software reset
expected_result: PL clears latch only after physical recovery plus software reset
next_action: Record AXI readback and physical input trace.

trigger: trigger E-stop with confirmed vertical-axis brake and axis gate connected
expected_result: brake output reaches active state before vertical-axis drive output is blocked
next_action: Capture brake and axis gate traces.

trigger: trigger E-stop with confirmed step or enable gate connected
expected_result: step or enable output is blocked by PL without waiting for PS/UI
acceptance_limit: hard gate within required safety latency
next_action: Capture input and axis output traces.

trigger: trigger E-stop with DO1-DO14 and PWM1-PWM2 connected through PL gate
expected_result: every confirmed general output reaches documented off/safe level
next_action: Capture all confirmed DO/PWM output states.

trigger: trigger E-stop with selected bus TX send-enable or driver-enable gate connected
expected_result: selected TX gate reaches idle/off state without resetting PHY/link
acceptance_limit: TX idle/off while link remains powered
next_action: Capture TX gate signal and link status.

trigger: hold E-stop latched while bus physical link is connected
expected_result: physical link clock/reset/power/RX observation remain alive
next_action: Record link status and RX/status observation during E-stop.

trigger: queue or simulate bus TX/control frames during E-stop latch
expected_result: no stale TX/control frame is replayed after reset release
next_action: Record queue owner evidence and post-reset bus trace.

trigger: power cycle board with confirmed E-stop path
expected_result: PL starts latched or in safe state until physical input and reset conditions are satisfied
next_action: Capture power-on output state and STATUS.

trigger: trigger and clear E-stop IRQ path
expected_result: PS can observe STATUS bits and IRQ clear does not clear E-stop latch
acceptance_limit: STATUS bits and IRQ semantics match spec
next_action: Record AXI/IRQ readback around trigger and clear.
